file.content:
# Plan: Increase height of plans page header

## Task Description
Increase the height of the plans page header (the `merch-card-collection-header` component when used on plans pages). The header currently uses a filter/search height of 44px. Since no exact target height was provided in the issue, increase by approximately 50% — raising the interactive control height from 44px to 66px and the search min-height from 44px to 66px — by overriding the relevant CSS custom properties in the plans-specific CSS.

## Relevant Files
- `web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js` — Main plans CSS; defines `merch-card-collection-header.plans` overrides; **edit** to add height variable overrides
- `web-components/src/variants/plans-v2.css.js` — Plans v2 CSS; also contains `merch-card-collection-header.plans`; **edit** to add height variable overrides consistently
- `web-components/src/merch-card-collection.js` — Defines default values for `--merch-card-collection-header-filter-height` (44px) and `--merch-card-collection-header-search-min-height` (44px); **read-only reference**

## Step by Step Tasks

### 1. Override header height in plans.css.js
- In the existing `merch-card-collection-header.plans` rule (around line 256), add two CSS custom property overrides:
  - `--merch-card-collection-header-filter-height: 66px;`
  - `--merch-card-collection-header-search-min-height: 66px;`
- This increases the filter button and search input heights from 44px to ~66px (~50% taller)

### 2. Override header height in plans-v2.css.js
- In the existing `merch-card-collection-header.plans` rule (around line 480), add the same two CSS custom property overrides:
  - `--merch-card-collection-header-filter-height: 66px;`
  - `--merch-card-collection-header-search-min-height: 66px;`

### 3. Verify no layout breakage
- Confirm child content (search input, filter button, sort button, result count) remains vertically centered within the taller header
- The existing `align-items: center` on the `#header` grid in `merch-card-collection.js` ensures child elements stay centered

## Acceptance Criteria
- `merch-card-collection-header` on plans pages renders taller than the default 44px height
- Filter button and search input are at least 66px tall on plans pages
- Child elements (search, filter, result count) remain vertically aligned within the taller header
- No layout regression on mobile (MOBILE_LANDSCAPE), tablet (TABLET_UP/TABLET_DOWN), or desktop (DESKTOP_UP, LARGE_DESKTOP) breakpoints

## Validation Commands
- `node --check web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js`
- `node --check web-components/src/variants/plans-v2.css.js`

tool_input.description: Get changed files since last two commits
Check for height overrides in both files
